ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Compliance With Production Of Trust Documents
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Continued To Jul-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Murphy for Timothy Reid. Marshal Berol in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that Mr. Berol's filing was late and that there was no time for a response from Mr. Murphy. Mr. Murphy stated that what was filed still leaves a number of unanswered questions, that some of the assets are still unclaimed assets and that he can not take any action with those assets without the Trust document. Mr. Berol stated that there were various distributions, that he has not been able to locate the Trust document and that he did not understand that he was supposed to deal with the surcharge amounts and the 10% interest. In response to the Court's inquiry, Mr. Murphy stated that he/his Client have not done any research as to any other method of collecting the unclaimed assets. Status on compliance with production of Trust documents and the accounting petition were continued to July 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Murphy to file his response.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Continued To Jun-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Compliance With Production Of Trust Documents
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Continued To Jun-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Murphy for Timothy Reid. Marshall Berol in Propria Persona.

Mr. Berol stated that he found some records (statements for the brokerage accounts for various time periods), provided Trust history, provided history of the Trust assets, indicated who the Beneficiaries are, etc. The Parties are in agreement as to what the Beneficiary percentages are and that the trust should be terminated. Mr. Murphy raised the issue of funds escheated to the State in the amount of $41,000.00, stated that the Controller's Office is requesting a copy of the Trust, that Mr. Berol does not have a copy of the Trust and asked that this amount be added to the surcharge against Mr. Berol. The surcharge issue was bifurcated and taken under submission. Status on compliance with production of Trust documents and the accounting petition were continued to June 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Berol to file a final response/objection and for Mr. Murphy to file a reply and any further petitions. The response/objection if any is to be filed no later than May 21, 2014. Reply is to be filed by May 28, 2014.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Compliance With Production Of Trust Documents
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Continued To Mar-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Murphy for Janet Reid. Marshall Berol in Propria Persona.

Mr. Murphy stated that Mr. Berol has not complied with turning over files and that he has not received a declaration from Mr. Berol stating that he has no files. Mr. Murphy also stated that they filed an accounting based on the limited information they have. Mr. Berol stated that there were several moves, that he has not been able to locate files and that he objects to the accounting. Status on compliance with production of trust documents was continued to March 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Berol is to file a declaration regarding efforts made to locate documents, what he searched for and what has been turned over (said declaration is to be filed by March 18, 2014).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Compliance With Production Of Trust Documents
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Continued To Feb-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Compliance With Production Of Trust Documents
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Continued To Feb-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Murphy for Janet Reid. Marshall Berol in Propria Persona.

Mr. Berol stated that he has not been able to locate documents but that he located some notes regarding assets from some years ago, and that there are some unclaimed property claims/assets in the Trust. Mr. Berol also stated that the majority of the assets have been distributed, that he can provide a list of what was distributed and that he does not have a copy of the Trust instrument. Mr. Murphy stated that Mr. Berol has not provided anything, that Mr. Berol has ignored his calls, that Mr. Berol called him at the last minute on Wednesday at 4:55 and that he is not inclined to grant a continuance. The Court suggested that Mr. Berol file a declaration under penalty of perjury that there are no files, what efforts he put forward in trying to locate documents and warned Mr. Berol about sanctions being imposed the next hearing if he appears with no files. Status on compliance with production of trust documents was continued to February 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Delivery Of Assets And Providing Information To The Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: James Murphy for and with Janet Reid and Tim Reid. Marshall Berol (Former Trustee in pro per).

Mr. Berol stated that he was unable to locate the Trust, that his office was moved several times, that he has contacted the prior trustee, Wells Fargo Bank for a copy of the Trust and that the bank did not have it. Mr. Murphy reported that the parties have agreed to the terms of the trust and the beneficiaries of the trust and that the Court has ordered Mr. Berol to file an accounting by June, that Mr. Berol was removed and that today's hearing is for status. Furthermore, he stated that he does not expect Mr. Berol to file an accounting, that his client has begin to reconstruct the accounting with the limited information that they have and that Mr. Berol has provided information on what the current assets are but no information on what he did all these years as the Trustee. Mr. Berol provided the history of the Trust and stated that assets were distribution to all seven beneficiaries in 1998 and 1999. The Court again ordered Mr. Berol to turn over any documents, notes, any material he has in his possession relating to the Trust to the successor trustee. The status on delivery of assets is resolved. The status to produce trust documents is set on December 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Murphy will file a declaration to take the status off calendar if Mr. Berol complies. Mr. Murphy to prepare an order for this hearing.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: James Murphy for and with Janet Reid (Petitioner). Marshall Berol (Trustee).

Mr. Murphy reported that the Trustee does not have an accounting but he is prepared to turn over the assets to the Successor Trustee. Mr. Berol stated that he agreed to turn over the assets, that there is unclaimed property with the State, that bulk of the trust was distributed some time ago and that he has no objection to change trustee. The Court granted the Petition to Remove Trustee and to Appoint Successor Trustee (subject to review of order). Bond is not required. Status for delivery of assets and providing information to the Successor Trustee is set on November 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Murphy stated that they will petition for change of venue to San Mateo. The Court reserved the issue of Mr. Berol's accounting until transfer to San Mateo.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Trustee Filing An Accounting And Providing A Copy Of The Trust
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Continued To Oct-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Trustee Filing An Accounting And Providing A Copy Of The Trust
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: James Murphy for Janet Reid. Marshall Berol (Trustee) in propria persona.

Mr. Berol apologized for his past non-appearances, stated that he is still looking for the copy of the Trust, that he does have various records with regard to the Trust assets, that there are some escheated funds that need to be collected, that the amount of the escheated funds is $35,000.00 per heir finders but that the amount is not clear, that he has contracted with a company to do the paperwork to collect the escheated funds, and that 5% will be paid to the company. Mr. Murphy stated that Mr. Berol finally contacted him last week, that the accounting was due 6/25/13, and that since it was Mr. Berol's negligence that the funds weren't collected that the cost to retrieve them should come out of his pocket. Mr. Berol presented the names of the parties and their interest percentages in the Trust and a brief history with regard to his appointment as Trustee. Mr. Berol further stated that he came in as Trustee in late 1989 and that he did not receive notice of the unclaimed funds because he had moved. He also addressed the Southwest Gas Corp shares, the Margarita Farms Stock which is 1/3 interest in a piece of real estate, and stated that distributions had previously been done by his sister Elizabeth. Mr. Murphy argued in support of the contempt noting that his clients are frustrated. The Court stated that it would not issue the contempt order today, requested that Mr. Berol talk with Mr. Murphy regarding all the information that he currently has obtained, and ordered Mr. Berol to file his account by 9/18/13. Both matters were continued to September 25, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to be heard with Ms. Reid's petition to remove Mr. Berol. Mr. Berol is ordered to appear on September 25, 2013.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Trustee Filing An Accounting And Providing A Copy Of The Trust
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Continued To Jul-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Murphy for and with Janet Reid. Tim Reid (Husband of Janet) was also present.

Mr. Murphy stated that accounting has not been filed by Mr. Berol, that he has heard nothing from him, and that Mr. Berol is ignoring them as well as the Court's order. An Order to Appear will be issued to Marshall Berol to appear on July 30, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he has failed to comply with the Court's order issued on June 3, 2013. Sanctions may be imposed. Status on Trustee filing an accounting and providing a copy of the Trust was also continued to that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Murphy for Janet Reid.

Mr. Murphy reported that he has not has any contact from the trustee and does not know why final distribution has not occurred. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Account was granted (subject to review of written order). The Trustee is to produce a copy of the trust and file an accounting by June 25, 2013. Status on Trustee filing an accounting and providing a copy of the trust was set for July 09, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy Chien.
